page: lessons/04-the-menu/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

function.name: search_by_meaning
function.description: Search the Bible by meaning rather than exact words. Use this when the user describes a theme, feeling, or idea — like 'verses about courage' — instead of naming a verse. Returns the closest verses with a similarity score.

query.description: What the user is looking for, in plain words

function.name: places_for_passage
function.description: List the places named in a Bible passage. Use this when the user asks where something happened. Takes a verse reference like 'Acts 9:3'.

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to [his] purpose.

message.content: According to Romans 8:28, "all things work together for good" (specifically, those mentioned in your question) for believers; they have predestined us towards an adopted status and a glorified state which cannot be taken away from God's promise.

text.KJV: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to [his] purpose.

finalAnswer: The model's answer:According to Romans 8:28, "all things work together for good" (specifically, those mentioned in your question) for believers; they have predestined us towards an adopted status and a glorified state which cannot be taken away from God's promise.
wirePanelText:
you asked: What does Romans 8:28 say?→ the model asked: lookup_verse {"ref":"Romans 8:28"}
← your code sent back: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to [his] purpose.
